General Information	Eligibility	Subject Areas	Approved Universities
The Khazanah Watan Scholarship is a prestigious award that offers opportunities for talented and high-achieving Malaysians to pursue Undergraduate and Postgraduate studies at selected leading local universities.



The aim of the Khazanah Watan Scholarship Programme is two-fold:-

To train Malaysia's brightest talents to transform its GLCs into competitive business locally and internationally.
To encourage individuals with excellent academic credentials to lead and participate in research initiatives that will contribute to the advancement of the universities' reputation in research and innovation.

Scholarship Coverage

General Information	Eligibility	Subject Areas	Approved Universities
Yayasan Khazanah secured a scholarship partnership with Payments Network Malaysia Sdn Bhd (PayNet) to support Malaysian Muslim B40 students (post-SPM/IGCSE) in 2023 throughout their undergraduate studies (Foundation and Degree) in Malaysia.

The funds are from PayNet’s wakalah allocation through corporate zakat proceedings.

Through this partnership, PayNet will sponsor up to 7 students in the area of Information Technology, Computer Science, Finance and other related courses. Recipients of this Scholarship are required to serve PayNet or other approved organisations for a duration equal to the study period.

Interested applicants should select the Khazanah Watan Scholarship Programme when submitting their application. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will first be informed that they are being considered for this scholarship. If they successfully pass all assessments, they will be awarded the Wakalah PayNet-Yayasan Khazanah Scholarship Programme.

title: Khazanah Global Scholarship Programme
raw_eligibility:

Khazanah Global Scholarship Programme
Investing in Today’s Talent for Tomorrow’s Promise.
Programme Summary
Where To Study
Our approved universities abroad
	
Study Level
University
	
Application Cycle
In March, yearly
(for Postgraduate studies)
In May / June, yearly
(for A-Level studies)
In June / July, yearly
(for Undergraduate studies)
	
Scholarship Coverage
Full
* Dates may be subject to change.
General Information	Eligibility	Subject Areas	Approved Universities
The Khazanah Global Scholarship is a prestigious award that offers opportunities for bright and high-achieving Malaysians to pursue their studies at top universities abroad. The scholarship is offered at three entry levels: (i) A-Level studies at Kolej Yayasan UEM as a pathway to undergraduate studies, (ii) direct undergraduate studies, and (iii) postgraduate studies (Master’s and PhD) at selected leading universities around the world.

Recipients of the Khazanah Global Scholarship for A-Levels will continue their Undergraduate studies abroad, provided they meet the scholarship requirements.



In addition, recipients of the Khazanah Global Scholarship are provided with leadership trainings and job attachments at leading organisations in Malaysia.

The trainings, job attachments and exposures, and the facility to gain professional experience at leading corporations in the world represent opportunities that we provide in our quest to nurture our scholars to realise their potential to become Malaysia's future business and industry leaders.

The duration of the scholarship will be for the full course of study, as stipulated in the offer of admission, subject to Yayasan Khazanah's terms and conditions.
